omitted_declarations.policy_reference: If you contact us or our customer care team, we will collect the data you provide. A record of this correspondence may also be kept to ensure a high quality customer service.

Images or videos taken from the camera: We use images and videos taken with your device camera through the app. This information is used to recognize and solve a problem you are trying to solve. This information together with derivatives is used for problem indexing and might be used for testing and improving the quality and features of the Service. Such information might be stored on device storage and sent to the Service servers when your device is connected to a Wi-Fi network. Using a wi-fi network might incur additional charges.
